tier: Tier 7.4f - Cost-Aware Policy/Action Held-Out Scoring Gate
claim: Tier 7.4f scored the frozen v2.4 cost-aware policy/action stack on the locked NAB and C-MAPSS public/real-ish action-cost families. The outcome is qualified C-MAPSS-only: v2.4 ranked first on C-MAPSS maintenance utility and beat the strongest external baseline with a positive paired CI, but NAB did not confirm and C-MAPSS did not separate from the prior v2.2 CRA reference with a positive paired CI.
caveat: Software held-out scoring only; qualified public-action signal, not broad public usefulness, not incremental v2.4 superiority over prior CRA references, not a new baseline freeze, not hardware/native transfer, and not AGI/ASI evidence.
